TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Blerim Destani hiya ga m' Engi. kawas tay 1981, ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 4, Blerim Destani, squliq na Bunge'. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) T'aring sa kawas 2004, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na Engi ru mqwas. Baqun anna ima pincyuwagan nya zyuwaw ga Time of the Comet (maki sa kawas 2008), Dossier K. (maki sa kawas 2009). Blerim Destani sraral mtzyaw ru qnxan maki Germany ru Macedonia. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: ő≤lerim *es~…ētani ńßija …£a m Ē eŇči. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, ő≤lerim *es~…ētani, s~…ēquliq na ő≤uŇče Ē. qnxan nja(qjanux nja) t ĒariŇč s~…ēa kawas~…ē ****, mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na eŇči ru mqwas~…ē. ő≤aqun anna ima pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja zjuwaw …£a time o* tńße ¶~ ®omet (maki s~…ēa kawas~…ē ****), *os~…ēs~…ēier k. (maki s~…ēa kawas~…ē ****). ő≤lerim *es~…ētani s~…ēraral mtzjaw ru qnxan maki …£ermanj ru ma ¶~ ®e*onia. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* a ¶~ ®tors~…ē
S.FORM: Blerim Destani hiya ga m' Engi. kawas tay 1981, ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 4, Blerim Destani, squliq na Bunge'. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) T'aring sa kawas 2004, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na Engi ru mqwas. Baqun anna ima pincyuwagan nya zyuwaw ga Time of the Comet (maki sa kawas 2008), Dossier K. (maki sa kawas 2009). Blerim Destani sraral mtzyaw ru qnxan maki Germany ru Macedonia. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
